description: Example filled rubric for a typical single-shot or weakly interactive Gemini answer. At least 30% of criteria have human_rating false (c3, c5, c7, c8, c10 = 5/10 = 50%).

criteria.criterion: Model asked at least one specific clarifying question before proposing the API.
Model proposed a minimal API and explicitly asked for user confirmation before implementing.
criteria.notes: Model proposed endpoints and asked 'Does this work?'

criteria.criterion: Model did not output full implementation code in the first response.
criteria.notes: First response included full code block; no prior clarification only.

criteria.criterion: After user input, model provided implementation sketch or code matching agreed API.
Model mentioned at least one edge case or failure mode.
criteria.notes: No edge case or failure mode mentioned.

criteria.criterion: Responses were structured in clear steps.
Model avoided assuming unspecified details without asking or stating assumption.
criteria.notes: Assumed string keys and in-memory dict without stating.

criteria.criterion: Model invited further interaction at least once.
API proposal included get, set, delete, list_keys.
Tone was collaborative rather than purely instructive.
criteria.notes: Mostly instructive; little 'shall we' or 'your preference'.
